The Basham brother who appeared with World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE) between 2002 and 2007 is **Doug Basham**. According to the context, Doug Basham appeared with WWE between 2002 and 2007, and he also appeared with Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA) in 2007 under the ring name Basham.

The question asks which program Doug Basham participated in 2007. The answer is:

**WWE**.
